text: Open Source Intel A Saudi Royal Court source says the Kingdom does not see itself as a direct party to the conflict. "This is not our war. If we are exposed to Iranian aggression, each event will have its own response. But as of now, we have not made a decision to enter this war." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043689721197408422/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：沙特王室消息人士称，沙特王国不认为自己是冲突的直接当事方。“这不是我们的战争。如果我们遭受伊朗的侵略，每一件事都会有相应的回应。但截至目前，我们尚未做出参战的决定。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043689721197408422/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Iran military spokesman: “U.S. restrictions on vessels in international waters is illegal” You can’t make this up. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043689542977278158/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：伊朗军事发言人：“美国对国际水域船只的限制是非法的”。你简直不敢相信。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043689542977278158/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel NEW 🔴 New York Post: Iranian officials are weighing whether to give up uranium enrichment as a U.S. condition to end the war. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：最新消息 🔴 《纽约邮报》：伊朗官员正在权衡是否放弃铀浓缩，作为美国结束战争的条件。推文

text: Visioner 🇭🇺 🇺🇦 🇪🇺 TISZA's Péter Magyar: We do not support Ukraine's accelerated accession to the EU. On one hand, we are talking about a country at war; it is absolutely absurd for a country at war to be admitted to the European Union. You can't even have real negotiations with all the accession chapters, so I don't think it's relevant at the moment. tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇭🇺 🇺🇦 🇪🇺 TISZA党的彼得·马扎尔（Péter Magyar）：我们不支持乌克兰加速加入欧盟。一方面，我们谈论的是一个处于战争状态的国家；让一个处于战争状态的国家加入欧盟是绝对荒谬的。你甚至无法就所有入盟章节进行真正的谈判，所以我认为目前这并不现实。推文

text: Open Source Intel Hungary's incoming PM Peter Magyar: His government will reverse Viktor Orban's decision to withdraw from the ICC. EU decisions on Israel will continue to be blocked but investigated case by case. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043688993917702384/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：匈牙利候任总理彼得·马扎尔：他的政府将推翻维克托·欧尔班退出国际刑事法院（ICC）的决定。欧盟关于以色列的决定将继续受到阻挠，但会逐案进行调查。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043688993917702384/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Hungary election winner Magyar: “We need good relations with the U.S.” Hungary election winner Magyar: “The U.S. is a very important partner.” Hungary election winner Magyar: “I will not call Trump.” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043688841618358518/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：匈牙利大选获胜者马扎尔：“我们需要与美国保持良好关系”。匈牙利大选获胜者马扎尔：“美国是一个非常重要的伙伴”。匈牙利大选获胜者马扎尔：“我不会给特朗普打电话”。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043688841618358518/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Spanish judge has charged Spains PM Sanchez’s wife with: • Tráfico de influencias (influence peddling) • Corrupción en los negocios (corruption in the private sector/business corruption) • Malversación de caudales públicos (embezzlement/misappropriation of public funds) • Apropiación indebida (misappropriation) NEW 🔴 The wife of Spain’s Prime Minister Pedro Sánchez has been formally charged with influence peddling and corruption. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043682489399443718/photo/1 - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：西班牙法官已对西班牙首相桑切斯的妻子提出指控，罪名包括：• 影响交易（以权谋私） • 商业腐败（私营部门腐败） • 挪用公款 • 侵占罪。最新消息 🔴 西班牙首相佩德罗·桑切斯的妻子已被正式指控犯有以权谋私和腐败罪。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043682489399443718/photo/1 - 开源情报推文

text: OSINTdefender According to Hungary’s incoming prime minister, Peter Magyar, his government will look to reverse Prime Minister Viktor Orban’s decision to withdraw from the International Criminal Court (ICC). Additionally, on the Hungary-Israel relationship, Magyar said that EU decisions on Israel will continue to be blocked, but will be investigated on a case-by-case basis. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender：据匈牙利候任总理彼得·马扎尔称，他的政府将寻求推翻维克托·欧尔班总理退出国际刑事法院（ICC）的决定。此外，关于匈牙利与以色列的关系，马扎尔表示，欧盟关于以色列的决定将继续受到阻挠，但将逐案进行调查。推文

text: Open Source Intel Over 250 Hezbollah terrorists eliminated in wave of strikes in Lebanon on April 8, including dozens in Beirut. They were all eliminated within 10 minutes tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：4月8日，黎巴嫩遭受一波空袭，超过250名真主党恐怖分子被消灭，其中包括贝鲁特的数十人。他们全部在10分钟内被消灭。推文

text: Open Source Intel 10 AM IS IN 13 MINUTES 10 AM IS IN TWO HOURS. - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：上午10点还有13分钟，上午10点还有两个小时。 - 开源情报推文

text: OSINTdefender The United Kingdom Maritime Trade Operations center has issued an advisory for all vessels in the Arabian (Persian) Gulf, Arabian Sea, Gulf of Oman, and the Strait of Hormuz, advising that restrictions will go into effect at 1400UTC (1000EST), affecting the entirety of the Iranian coastline. Neutral vessels currently in Iranian ports have been granted a limited grace period to depart. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender：英国海上贸易行动中心（UKMTO）已向阿拉伯（波斯）湾、阿拉伯海、阿曼湾和霍尔木兹海峡的所有船只发布公告，建议限制措施将于协调世界时14:00（美东时间10:00）生效，影响整个伊朗海岸线。目前在伊朗港口的中立船只已获得有限的离港宽限期。推文

text: Péter Magyar: I will not call Trump. But if he, or anyone from the U.S. administration, reaches out to us, we will be available.
text_zh: 彼得·马扎尔：我不会给特朗普打电话。但如果他或美国政府的任何人联系我们，我们将随时待命。

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 The USS George H.W. Bush has crossed the Strait of Gibraltar enroute to the Middle East. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国乔治·H·W·布什号航空母舰已穿过直布罗陀海峡，前往中东。 @wfwitness

text: Trump's deadline is over. The U.S. blockade of Iran begins.
text_zh: 特朗普的最后期限已过。美国对伊朗的封锁开始。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 U.S. President Donald Trump announced that the United States Navy will immediately begin blockading any ships trying to enter or leave the Strait of Hormuz. He said the talks with Iran went well and most points were agreed, but the nuclear issue was…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 The blockade of the Strait of Hormuz is now in effect after U.S. President Trump’s 10am deadline has passed. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普宣布，美国海军将立即开始封锁任何试图进出霍尔木兹海峡的船只。他说与伊朗的会谈进展顺利，大多数要点已达成一致，但核问题……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 在美国总统特朗普的上午10点最后期限过后，霍尔木兹海峡的封锁现已生效。 @wfwitness

text: 🇭🇺 💬 🇷🇺 Magyar stated that he would like to discuss with Putin the terms and cost of Hungary's and Russia's current energy agreements He hopes that the EU will lift sanctions against Russia after the conflict in Ukraine ends. Hungary will do everything to diversify energy supplies but this does not mean refusing to supply from Russia, he stated 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇭🇺 💬 🇷🇺 马扎尔表示，他希望与普京讨论匈牙利和俄罗斯当前能源协议的条款和成本。他希望欧盟在乌克兰冲突结束后解除对俄罗斯的制裁。他表示，匈牙利将尽一切努力实现能源供应多元化，但这并不意味着拒绝俄罗斯的供应。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Péter Magyar: Ukraine is the victim of this war. Everyone knows that. No one should tell Ukraine under what conditions it must enter peace or sign a peace treaty. We cannot ask any country to give up its territory. If they do, they would be considered traitors.
text_zh: 彼得·马扎尔：乌克兰是这场战争的受害者。每个人都知道这一点。没有人应该告诉乌克兰必须在什么条件下实现和平或签署和平条约。我们不能要求任何国家放弃其领土。如果他们这样做，他们将被视为叛徒。

text: 🇷🇺 💬 🇭🇺 Russia is ready to build relations with the new Hungarian government but everything depends on its understanding of national interests, Lavrov stated. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 💬 🇭🇺 拉夫罗夫表示，俄罗斯准备与匈牙利新政府建立关系，但一切都取决于其对国家利益的理解。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇭🇺 Péter Magyar calls for Hungary's President to resign saying that he didn't say a word when thousands of Hungarian children were abused by pedophiles 🔴 @DDGeopolitics | Socials | Donate | Advertising" 🇭🇺 💬 🇺🇦 Magyar agrees with Hungary's refusal to provide Ukraine with an EU loan of €90 billion However - "No one should tell Ukrainians on what terms the war needs to end" He stated that he does not support the accelerated accession of Ukraine to the EU, emphasizing the need for an equal approach to all candidate countries. According to him, the issue of Ukraine's membership could be put to a referendum, but this is not expected to happen in the next ten years. At the same time, he noted that the restoration of the rights of the ethnic Hungarian minority will be a key condition for the normalization of relations with Ukraine. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇭🇺 彼得·马扎尔呼吁匈牙利总统辞职，称当数千名匈牙利儿童受到恋童癖者虐待时，他一言不发 🔴 @DDGeopolitics | 社交媒体 | 捐赠 | 广告” 🇭🇺 💬 🇺🇦 马扎尔同意匈牙利拒绝向乌克兰提供900亿欧元欧盟贷款。然而——“没有人应该告诉乌克兰人战争需要在什么条件下结束”。他表示不支持乌克兰加速加入欧盟，强调需要对所有候选国采取平等态度。据他称，乌克兰的成员资格问题可以进行全民公投，但预计未来十年内不会发生。同时，他指出，恢复匈牙利少数民族的权利将是关系正常化的关键条件。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇩🇿 GRAPHIC: A Suicide attack occurred on Mohamed Boudiaf street in the city of Blida, approximately 48 kilometres south‑west of Algiers. Security reinforcements have been deployed. Geolocation: (For Nerds) 36.4830480, 2.8259680 @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇩🇿 图文：阿尔及尔西南约48公里的布利达市穆罕默德·布迪亚夫街发生自杀式袭击。安全增援部队已部署。地理定位：（极客专用）36.4830480, 2.8259680 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇬🇧 🇮🇷 The UKMTO has announced that maritime access restrictions affecting Iranian ports and coastal areas came into force at 1400 UTC on 13 April 2026. The measures apply to vessels of all flags engaging with Iranian ports, oil terminals, and coastal facilities across the Arabian Gulf, Gulf of Oman, and the Arabian Sea east of the Strait of Hormuz. The restrictions cover the entire Iranian coastline, including key ports and energy infrastructure, while neutral vessels currently in Iranian ports have been granted a limited grace period to depart. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇬🇧 🇮🇷 UKMTO宣布，影响伊朗港口和沿海地区的海上准入限制于2026年4月13日协调世界时14:00生效。这些措施适用于所有与伊朗港口、石油码头和沿海设施进行往来的悬挂各国旗帜的船只，范围涵盖阿拉伯湾、阿曼湾和霍尔木兹海峡以东的阿拉伯海。限制措施覆盖整个伊朗海岸线，包括主要港口和能源基础设施，目前在伊朗港口的中立船只已获得有限的离港宽限期。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 The Israeli military announced that it has confirmed that more than 250 Hezbollah members and commanders were killed in the largest strike of Operation Roaring Lion on 8 April across Beirut, the Bekaa and southern Lebanon. Those killed included Hassan Mustafa Nasser (head of logistics support headquarters), Ali Qassem, Abu Ali Abbas and Ali Hijazi (senior intelligence commanders), and Abu Muhammad Habib (deputy commander of Hezbollah’s missile unit). Lebanon’s health ministry reported 357 total dead in that strike wave, meaning at least 70% of those killed were Hezbollah members, using the IDF's claimed assessment. The total number of Hezbollah fighters allegedly eliminated in the current campaign has now exceeded 1,500. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列军方宣布，已确认在4月8日“咆哮狮子”行动中，针对贝鲁特、贝卡谷地和黎巴嫩南部最大规模的打击中，有超过250名真主党成员和指挥官被击毙。死者包括哈桑·穆斯塔法·纳赛尔（后勤支援总部负责人）、阿里·卡西姆、阿布·阿里·阿巴斯和阿里·希贾齐（高级情报指挥官），以及阿布·穆罕默德·哈比卜（真主党导弹部队副指挥官）。黎巴嫩卫生部报告称，该波打击共造成357人死亡，这意味着根据以色列国防军的评估，至少70%的死者是真主党成员。目前在当前行动中被消灭的真主党武装人员总数已超过1500人。 @wfwitness

text: 🔄 Forwarded from China and Geopolitics with Danny Haiphong: *** Join Danny Haiphong LIVE today April 13th 11am eastern 5pm CET w/ Mohammad Marandi*** Prof. Marandi details his experience in Islamabad for the negotiations between he US and Iran, and what the blockade declared by Trump on Iran's ports means for the country and the world. Don't miss the latest update on the next phase of the war as the war restarts amid failed peace talks. Watch here: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3_YeUduTclU
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 Danny Haiphong 的“中国与地缘政治”：*** 加入 Danny Haiphong 今天4月13日美东时间上午11点/欧洲中部时间下午5点与 Mohammad Marandi 的直播 *** Marandi 教授详细介绍了他在伊斯兰堡参与美伊谈判的经历，以及特朗普宣布对伊朗港口实施的封锁对该国和世界意味着什么。不要错过随着战争在和平谈判失败后重启，关于战争下一阶段的最新更新。在此观看：https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3_YeUduTclU

text: Péter Magyar: If Vladimir Putin calls me, I will pick up the phone. I do not think that will happen. I will not call him myself, but if we do talk, I can tell him to please stop the killing now, after four years, and end that war, which doesn't make any sense from their point of view either, because tens of thousands of Russians have lost their lives. I don't think he is going to end the war on my advice. I very much hope that he will be forced to do so regardless.
text_zh: 彼得·马扎尔：如果弗拉基米尔·普京给我打电话，我会接听。我不认为会发生这种情况。我自己不会给他打电话，但如果我们交谈，我可以告诉他，请在四年后停止杀戮，结束那场战争，从他们的角度来看，这场战争也没有任何意义，因为成千上万的俄罗斯人已经失去了生命。我不认为他会听从我的建议结束战争。我非常希望他无论如何都会被迫这样做。

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Beirut Disaster Management Center: The damaged building targeted by the IDF on Wednesday will be demolished following a strike in Tallet El Khayat, Verdun due to the danger it poses to public safety. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 贝鲁特灾害管理中心：周三被以色列国防军瞄准的受损建筑物，由于对公共安全构成危险，将在塔莱特·埃尔·卡亚特（Tallet El Khayat）和凡尔登（Verdun）的袭击后被拆除。 @wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel Egypt, Pakistan, and Turkey are mediating a push for new U.S.-Iran talks before the April 21 ceasefire expires. The parties are reportedly "not in a complete deadlock, the door isn't closed yet." - Axios. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：埃及、巴基斯坦和土耳其正在斡旋，推动在4月21日停火协议到期前进行新的美伊会谈。据报道，各方“并未陷入完全僵局，大门尚未关闭”。 - Axios。推文

text: OSINTdefender Here's the current view of tanker (red) and container (green) traffic in the Persian Gulf and Gulf of Oman. President Donald J. Trump's naval blockade of Iranian ports begins in less than 30 minutes. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2043683585178083562/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender：这是目前波斯湾和阿曼湾油轮（红色）和集装箱船（绿色）交通的视图。唐纳德·J·特朗普总统对伊朗港口的海军封锁将在不到30分钟内开始。 https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2043683585178083562/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel A senior US official told Al-Jazeera: We are ready to impose a naval blockade on Iran, and we have enough forces and equipment to carry it out. We will implement this, regardless of the duration set by President Trump. We will not discuss the possibility of the US fleet passing through the Strait of Hormuz to secure our operations, nor will we, at this time, discuss the rules of engagement in the event of a violation of the naval blockade of Iran. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：一位美国高级官员告诉半岛电视台：我们准备对伊朗实施海军封锁，我们有足够的兵力和装备来执行。无论特朗普总统设定的期限如何，我们都将执行。我们不会讨论美国舰队通过霍尔木兹海峡以确保我们行动的可能性，目前也不会讨论在违反伊朗海军封锁情况下的交战规则。推文

text: Open Source Intel Russia's Rosatom says it has begun the final wave of evacuation from Iran's Bushehr nuclear power plant. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：俄罗斯国家原子能公司（Rosatom）表示，已开始从伊朗布什尔核电站进行最后一波撤离。推文

text: WarTranslated As usual, not even a day has passed, and the Russians are already in a state of hysteria following Orban's election defeat. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2043682557733097677/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated：像往常一样，甚至不到一天，俄罗斯人在欧尔班选举失败后就已经陷入了歇斯底里。 https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2043682557733097677/photo/1 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 Israel’s Supreme Court has barred public entry to the courtroom during the hearing on the potential dismissal of Minister Itamar Ben-Gvir, citing concerns over possible disruptions and outbursts. It was announced that the proceedings will be broadcast live. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 以色列最高法院禁止公众在审理可能罢免伊塔马尔·本-格维尔部长的听证会期间进入法庭，理由是担心可能出现干扰和爆发冲突。宣布审判过程将进行现场直播。 @wfwitness

text: Péter Magyar on Ukraine: We do not support Ukraine's accelerated accession to the EU. On one hand, we are talking about a country at war; it is absolutely absurd for a country at war to be admitted to the European Union.
text_zh: 彼得·马扎尔谈乌克兰：我们不支持乌克兰加速加入欧盟。一方面，我们谈论的是一个处于战争状态的国家；让一个处于战争状态的国家加入欧盟是绝对荒谬的。

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Israeli drone activity detected over the Jnah Neighborhood of Beirut. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 在贝鲁特吉纳（Jnah）社区上空探测到以色列无人机活动。 @wfwitness

text: Péter Magyar on Russian oil: Russia stays here, Hungary stays here. We will do everything for diversification, but this does not mean that we will decouple. We will always get oil as cheaply and safely as possible.
text_zh: 彼得·马扎尔谈俄罗斯石油：俄罗斯留在这里，匈牙利留在这里。我们将尽一切努力实现多元化，但这并不意味着我们将脱钩。我们将始终以尽可能便宜和安全的方式获得石油。

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 The official X account for Israel posted a humorous image insinuating that Hezbollah was standing in the way of peace negotiations with Lebanon. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 以色列官方X账号发布了一张幽默图片，暗示真主党阻碍了与黎巴嫩的和平谈判。 @wfwitness

text: Ukraine carried out a long-range drone strike on the Apatit (PhosAgro) chemical plant in Cherepovets, deep inside Russia (about 800–1,000 km from Ukraine). The plant is a major fertilizer and chemical producer, with some materials considered potentially dual-use.
text_zh: 乌克兰对俄罗斯境内深处（距乌克兰约800-1000公里）切列波韦茨的Apatit（PhosAgro）化工厂进行了远程无人机袭击。该工厂是主要的化肥和化学品生产商，其中一些材料被认为具有潜在的两用性。

text: 🇮🇷 🇻🇦 Iranian President Pazeshkian in a message to Pope Leo XIV: I condemn the insult to Your Excellency on behalf of the great nation of Iran, and declare that the desecration of Jesus, the prophet of peace and brotherhood, is not acceptable to any free person. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 🇻🇦 伊朗总统佩泽希齐扬在致教皇利奥十四世的信息中表示：我代表伟大的伊朗民族谴责对阁下的侮辱，并声明亵渎和平与兄弟情谊的先知耶稣，对于任何自由人来说都是不可接受的。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 A woman in her sixties was lightly wounded when a Hezbollah rocket struck the northern city of Nahariya. She was injured by the blast and glass shards. The Israeli military said fewer than ten rockets were launched from Lebanon; most were intercepted, but one hit near a residential building. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 一名六十多岁的妇女在真主党火箭弹击中北部城市纳哈里亚时受轻伤。她被爆炸和玻璃碎片炸伤。以色列军方称，从黎巴嫩发射的火箭弹不到十枚；大多数被拦截，但有一枚击中了一栋住宅楼附近。 @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇱 🇮🇹 "We strongly condemn the manipulative use of the recent cover of L'Espresso." - Israeli Ambassador to Italy ℹ️ The magazine literally used a real photo for their cover. Nothing was manipulated. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇱 🇮🇹 “我们强烈谴责对《L'Espresso》杂志最新封面的操纵性使用。” - 以色列驻意大利大使 ℹ️ 该杂志确实在封面上使用了真实照片。没有任何东西被操纵。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Two Hezbollah fighters of Armenian origin have been killed in fighting in southern Lebanon. Adam Khrikhor Hachmian, a Christian who converted to Shia Islam, adopted the name Adam and was buried according to Shia customs. Manuel Babakian, a senior field commander from the group’s “founders’ generation” known as “Mano the Armenian”, was also killed. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 两名亚美尼亚裔真主党战士在黎巴嫩南部的战斗中丧生。亚当·克里科尔·哈奇米安（Adam Khrikhor Hachmian）是一名皈依什叶派伊斯兰教的基督徒，他取名亚当并按照什叶派习俗下葬。该组织“创始人一代”的高级战地指挥官曼努埃尔·巴巴基安（Manuel Babakian，被称为“亚美尼亚人马诺”）也被击毙。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇧🇭 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Bahrain’s Crown Prince Salman bin Hamad Al Khalifa, who is also deputy supreme commander of the armed forces and prime minister, met with U.S. Central Command chief Admiral Brad Cooper to discuss strengthening strategic partnership in military and defence fields. The Crown Prince highlighted the historic role of bilateral ties in deterring Iranian attacks. The two also reviewed regional developments. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇧🇭 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 巴林王储萨勒曼·本·哈马德·阿勒哈利法（同时担任武装部队副最高统帅和首相）会见了美国中央司令部司令布拉德·库珀海军上将，讨论加强军事和国防领域的战略伙伴关系。王储强调了双边关系在威慑伊朗袭击方面的历史作用。双方还回顾了地区局势发展。 @wfwitness

text: Iran Threatens Gulf Ports as U.S. Imposes Naval Blockade Iran’s Khatam al-Anbiya Central HQ Spokesperson Ebrahim Zolfaghari said no port in the Gulf will be safe if Iranian ports were threatened, after U.S. military announced a blockade of Iranian ports starting Monday. READ MORE
text_zh: 伊朗威胁海湾港口，美国实施海军封锁。伊朗哈塔姆·安比亚中央总部发言人易卜拉欣·佐尔法加里表示，如果伊朗港口受到威胁，海湾地区没有一个港口是安全的。此前美国军方宣布从周一开始封锁伊朗港口。阅读更多

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 NPR : A senior Hezbollah field commander, using the nom de guerre Jihad, stated that the group has adopted a new decentralised command structure under leader Naim Qassem. Fighters are divided into semi‑autonomous units that do not communicate with each other to avoid Israeli surveillance. “One specialises in shooting, another watches the road. Another might even specialise in wrapping sandwiches for the fighters,” he said. Following the 2024 pager attacks, Hezbollah no longer imports electronics and uses old Motorola devices, handwritten notes and couriers on motorbikes. The commander admitted mistakes led to the killing of Hassan Nasrallah. He claimed Hezbollah did not disarm but gave the Lebanese army empty boxes and old items. Smuggling weapons through Syria remains possible despite Assad’s fall, and the group manufactures some weapons domestically using internet tutorials. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 NPR：一名使用“圣战”作为化名的真主党高级战地指挥官表示，该组织在领导人纳伊姆·卡西姆的领导下采用了新的去中心化指挥结构。战士们被分成半自治的单位，彼此之间不进行通信，以避免以色列的监视。“一个专门负责射击，另一个负责观察道路。另一个甚至可能专门负责为战士包装三明治，”他说。在2024年寻呼机袭击事件后，真主党不再进口电子产品，而是使用旧的摩托罗拉设备、手写笔记和摩托车信使。该指挥官承认错误导致了哈桑·纳斯鲁拉的死亡。他声称真主党并没有解除武装，而是给了黎巴嫩军队空箱子和旧物品。尽管阿萨德倒台，但通过叙利亚走私武器仍然可行，该组织利用互联网教程在国内制造了一些武器。 @wfwitness

text: 🇭🇺 Péter Magyar calls for Hungary's President to resign saying that he didn't say a word when thousands of Hungarian children were abused by pedophiles 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇭🇺 彼得·马扎尔呼吁匈牙利总统辞职，称当数千名匈牙利儿童受到恋童癖者虐待时，他一言不发 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 The governor of Tehran Mohammad-Sadegh Motamedian said U.S. and Israeli attacks constitute war crimes, with 40,000 residential homes damaged in the province. Emergency services, schools and even UNESCO‑listed historical sites have been hit. He added that there is international silence in the face of such crimes, and that Iran will document and pursue the crimes through international bodies. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 德黑兰省省长穆罕默德-萨德格·莫塔梅迪安表示，美国和以色列的袭击构成了战争罪，该省有40,000处住宅受损。紧急服务机构、学校甚至联合国教科文组织列出的历史遗迹都遭到了袭击。他补充说，国际社会对这些罪行保持沉默，伊朗将记录并追究这些罪行。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 Al-Akhbar: Israeli forces have destroyed the ancient fortress and shrine of Simon al-Safa in the town of Shama, southern Lebanon, using ground bulldozers and airstrikes. The site, located about 5 kilometers from the Israeli border, is traditionally associated with St. Peter. Israeli Army Radio reports that it was the scene of a clash about a year and a half ago in which Israeli researcher Zeev Erlich and Golani soldier Gur Kehati were killed. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 Al-Akhbar：以色列军队使用地面推土机和空袭摧毁了黎巴嫩南部沙马镇的西蒙·阿勒-萨法（Simon al-Safa）古堡和圣殿。该遗址距离以色列边境约5公里，传统上与圣彼得有关。以色列陆军电台报道称，大约一年半前，这里曾发生过冲突，以色列研究员泽夫·埃利希（Zeev Erlich）和戈拉尼旅士兵古尔·凯哈蒂（Gur Kehati）在冲突中丧生。 @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu: “We are not talking about 5 positions in southern Lebanon, but a security belt to eliminate the threat of a Hezbollah ( ground) invasion and push back the missile threat”
text_zh: 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 以色列总理本雅明·内塔尼亚胡：“我们谈论的不是黎巴嫩南部的5个阵地，而是一个安全带，以消除真主党（地面）入侵的威胁并击退导弹威胁”
